titles.text: Negima!? Magister Negi Magi: Chou Mahora Taisen Cut-iin, Keiyaku Shikkou Dechai-masuu
Negima!?: Chou Mahora Taisen Kattoiin, Keiyaku Shikkou Dechai-masuu
Negima!?: Chou Mahora Taisen Kattoiin, Keiyaku Shikkou Dechai-masuu

descriptions.text: The first Negima game for the Nintendo DS. A strategy game that plays similarly to Namco X Capcom and Super Robot Taisen OG Saga: Endless Frontier with some interactive adventure game elements thrown in.
